documents.title: Issue INC-481 - duplicate charge after retry
documents.text: Issue INC-481 reports duplicate charges after retry in the checkout flow. The suspected component is payments-api. The impacted service is ledger-sync. The recurring fingerprint is DUPL-443. The incident appears in production after queue replay.

documents.title: Runbook - duplicate payment mitigation
documents.text: When customers report duplicate charges, verify idempotency keys in payments-api and inspect queue-replay-worker logs. Duplicate debits often occur when ledger-sync replays messages without a valid idempotency token.

documents.title: Release note - retry policy change
documents.text: Release 2026-03-12 changed the retry policy for queue-replay-worker and removed the cache of processed idempotency keys. This increased the chance of duplicate payment events reaching ledger-sync.

documents.title: Architecture note - checkout payment path
documents.text: payments-api publishes payment events to queue-replay-worker. queue-replay-worker forwards events to ledger-sync. ledger-sync writes to billing-ledger. Duplicate writes surface as customer double charge complaints.

documents.title: Support response template for duplicate charge
documents.text: When support receives a duplicate charge complaint, acknowledge incident INC-481, ask for the order identifier, avoid manual refund until ledger reconciliation completes, and route the ticket to payments-api on-call.

documents.title: Shipping delay incident
documents.text: Issue SHIP-204 reports delivery delays caused by an inventory sync timeout. The component is shipment-orchestrator and the impacted service is stock-gateway.

scenarios.query: Quais incidentes e documentos sao mais parecidos com um problema de cobranca duplicada apos retry?
scenarios.goal: Mostrar que semantic search encontra materiais proximos mesmo sem entidade explicita.

scenarios.query: Que cadeia conecta INC-481 ao servico impactado e ao componente suspeito?
scenarios.goal: Mostrar que graph retrieval supera vetor puro quando a pergunta pede relacoes explicitas e multi-hop.

scenarios.query: Qual resposta devo dar ao time de suporte sobre o problema de cobranca duplicada?
scenarios.goal: Mostrar que retrieval puro devolve materia-prima, enquanto GraphRAG entrega uma resposta operacional grounded.
